verses.text: Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Moab mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leiseek cian'na-ah a kizang leikanga zat dingin Edom kumpipa' guhte a hal uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moab gamsung khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding a, Kerioth khuapi munmuan'huai teng a kangtum ding hi. Galkapte' otna leh peengkul kitumna lak, galkidona gamlum sungah Moab mite si ding uh hi
Tuate lakah Moab gam ukte ka sisak ding a, a uliante ka that ding hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thukhamte nialin ka thuhilhnate zuilo uh hi. A pu a pate un a na biaksa pasian manlote mah in amaute lam pialsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Judah gamsung teng ka kangtumsak ding a, Jerusalem munmuan'huai teng a kangtum ding hi.

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pelloin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in leiba a loh zawhloh man bekun midik kimlai zuak uh a, khedap bu khat man a loh zawhloh man bekun mi cimawhte sila-in a zuak uh hi
Amaute in mizawngte' lutang leivui lakah tuancil uh a, keima min siangtho a ninsak dingin biakinn-a numei paktatte kiangah tangvalte leh papite a pai uh hi
Biakna tau gei khempeuhah amaute lum uh a, sum leitawina hangin a puan kepsakte uh a phah uh hi. Amaute in a Pasian uh' biakinn sungah leibate kiang pan a laksak uh leenggahzu a dawn uh hi
Ahi zongin amaute ka khualna hangin taamtak sing bangin a sang mahmah, tawsaw kung bangin a khauhtuak mahmah Amor mite amau-a' dingin ka suksiatsak a, a dawn pana kipan a zung dongin ka sukmaisak hi
No ka mihingte, Egypt gam pek panin hong paikhiatpihin, gamlakah kum sawmli sung kong makaih a, note-a' dingin Amor mite' gam kong pia hi
Na tapate uh pawlkhat kamsang dingin ka teel a, na tangvalte uh pawlkhat Nazir mi dingin ka teel hi. Israel aw, tu-a ka gen bangmah hilo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci khin hi
Ahi zongin note in Nazir mite leenggahzu na dawnsak uh a, kamsangte in ka thu a genlohna dingun thu na pia uh hi
Tu-in buhlomte in a pua bawngleeng a netcipsuk bangin note na omna mun uhah kong nengcipsuk ding hi
A tai hatte nangawn suakta zolo ding a, a thahatte a hatna bei ding a, galhangte in amau' nuntakna hu zolo ding uh hi
Thaltawite nangawn in do zolo ding a, a tai hatte nangawn kisuahtak zolo ding a, sakol tung tuangte nangawn in a nuntakna suahtak zolo ding hi
Tua ni ciangin galhang pente nangawn taimang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi.
